S.FORM: = John Lee Ka-chiu = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 12 jiyax 7 ka John Lee Ka-chiu ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Hoengkong ta sayang o kiya ka John Lee Ka-chiu, pnaah hngkawas 2022 idas 7 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ɟoħn ləə ka-ʦħiu = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * ka ɟoħn ləə ka-ʦħiu ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ħoəŋkoŋ ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟoħn ləə ka-ʦħiu, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = John Lee Ka-chiu = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 12 jiyax 7 ka John Lee Ka-chiu ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Hoengkong ta sayang o kiya ka John Lee Ka-chiu, pnaah hngkawas 2022 idas 7 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ɟoħn ləə ka-ʦħiu = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * ka ɟoħn ləə ka-ʦħiu ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ħoəŋkoŋ ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟoħn ləə ka-ʦħiu, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
